skills.name: browser-automation
skills.description: Use when controlling web pages with the OpenClaw browser tool, especially multi-step flows, login checks, tab management, or recovery from stale refs/timeouts.

skills.name: taskflow-inbox-triage
skills.description: Example TaskFlow pattern for inbox triage, intent routing, waiting on replies, and later summaries.

skills.name: node-connect
skills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw Android, iOS, or macOS node pairing, QR/setup code, route, auth, and connection failures.

skills.name: healthcheck
skills.description: Audit and harden hosts running OpenClaw for SSH, firewall, updates, exposure, cron checks, and risk posture.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Create, edit, improve, tidy, review, audit, or restructure AgentSkills and SKILL.md files.

skills.name: taskflow
skills.description: Coordinate multi-step detached tasks as one durable TaskFlow job with owner context, state, waits, and child tasks.

skills.name: weather
skills.description: Get current weather, rain, temperature, and forecasts for locations or travel planning.
